product_overview: Learn Tracker is a personal learning dashboard that organizes roadmaps, study logs, streak gamification, and quick notes into a single Bento-style UI. The current MVP provides a static, animated frontend layout with placeholder interactions and planned backend integration.
core_goals: Provide a single-pane dashboard to visualize learning progress and recent activity
Surface gamification (streaks, XP, levels) to motivate consistent study
Expose structured learning roadmaps with clear completed/pending steps
Offer lightweight quick notes with markdown hints and future AI assistance
Ship an extendable UI scaffold that can be wired to a backend API in Phase 2

features.name: Dashboard Bento Grid
features.description: Responsive bento-style grid layout on the main dashboard that arranges animated widget cards and a placeholder Add Widget tile.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See bento grid with multiple widgets laid out in glass cards -> See staggered fade-in animations on page load -> Hover over + Add Widget button -> See scale animation
Navigate to / -> Hover over a widget GlassCard -> See hover elevation and subtle border change -> Click + Add Widget button -> Nothing happens (UI-only placeholder)

features.name: Streak Widget
features.description: Displays the user's current learning streak, level badge, and an animated XP progress bar showing progress toward the next level.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Streak widget in the grid -> View current streak count (12 days) -> View level badge (Level 5) -> See animated XP progress bar filling to 80% -> Hover over Streak widget -> See gradient background opacity change
Navigate to / -> Attempt to log a study session (expectation) -> Observe streak and XP do not change because data is hardcoded

features.name: Roadmap Widget
features.description: Shows the active roadmap (Mastering Python) with visual indicators for completed and pending steps and hover-to-reveal Start action on incomplete steps.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Roadmap widget titled 'Mastering Python' -> See path label 'BACKEND PATH' -> See completed steps with check icons (Intro to Python, Data Structures) -> See pending steps with circle icons (OOP Concepts, Decorators) -> Hover over pending step -> See Start button appear
Navigate to / -> Hover over pending step -> Click Start button -> No step toggles or navigation occur (Start action not implemented)

features.name: Recent Log Widget
features.description: Displays the most recent study session with topic, chapter, duration indicator and a Resume Session action affordance.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Recent Log widget showing 'FastAPI Basics, Backend Chapter 3' -> See study time indicator '45m today' -> Hover over Resume Session button -> See button highlight and play icon turn purple
Navigate to / -> Click Resume Session button -> Nothing happens (resume action not implemented / UI-only)

features.name: Quick Note Widget
features.description: Full-width textarea for jotting quick markdown-formatted notes with an AI Assist button in the header (UI placeholder).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on the quick notes textarea -> Type text into the quick notes area -> See AI Assist button in the header of the widget -> See 'markdown supported' label at the bottom
Navigate to / -> Type notes into the quick notes textarea -> Refresh the page -> Observe notes are lost (no persistence implemented)

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Fixed sidebar containing brand, primary navigation links (Dashboard, Roadmaps, Resources, Study Logs), settings button with hover animation, and a user profile area.
user_flows: Load any page -> See logo and Learn Tracker brand name in the sidebar -> See user profile section showing 'Student, Pro Plan' -> Click Dashboard link -> Navigate to / -> See Dashboard navigation item highlighted with indigo indicator -> Hover over Settings button -> See rotate animation
Load any page -> Click Roadmaps link -> Navigate to /roadmaps -> See Next.js 404 page (Roadmaps page not implemented)
Load any page -> Click Resources link -> Navigate to /resources -> See Next.js 404 page (Resources page not implemented)
Load any page -> Click Study Logs link -> Navigate to /logs -> See Next.js 404 page (Study Logs page not implemented)

routes.description: Main dashboard page with bento grid layout showing streak, roadmap, recent log, and quick note widgets
Roadmaps page (linked in sidebar, not yet implemented)
Resources page (linked in sidebar, not yet implemented)
Study Logs page (linked in sidebar, not yet implemented)

features.name: Dashboard Bento Grid
features.description: Main dashboard displays a responsive bento grid layout with animated widgets using Framer Motion stagger animations
user_interactions: View the dashboard page with animated widget grid
See staggered fade-in animations on page load
Hover over the Add Widget button to see scale animation

features.name: Streak Widget
features.description: Displays current learning streak (12 days), level indicator, and XP progress bar with animated fill
user_interactions: View current streak count (12 days)
View level badge (Level 5)
See animated XP progress bar filling to 80%
Hover to see gradient background opacity change

features.name: Roadmap Widget
features.description: Shows learning roadmap progress for Mastering Python with completed and pending steps
user_interactions: View roadmap title (Mastering Python) and path label (BACKEND PATH)
See completed steps with check icons (Intro to Python, Data Structures)
See pending steps with circle icons (OOP Concepts, Decorators)
Hover over pending steps to see Start button appear

features.name: Recent Log Widget
features.description: Shows the most recent study session with resume capability
user_interactions: View recent study session (FastAPI Basics, Backend Chapter 3)
See study time indicator (45m today)
Hover to see Resume Session button highlight and play icon turn purple

features.name: Quick Note Widget
features.description: A textarea widget for jotting down quick notes with markdown support indicator
user_interactions: Click on the textarea to start typing notes
Type text into the quick notes area
See AI Assist button in the header
See markdown supported label at the bottom

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Fixed sidebar with navigation links, logo, settings button, and user profile section
user_interactions: View logo and Learn Tracker brand name
Click Dashboard link to navigate to /
Click Roadmaps link to navigate to /roadmaps
Click Resources link to navigate to /resources
Click Study Logs link to navigate to /logs
See active navigation item highlighted with indigo indicator
Hover over Settings button to see rotate animation
View user profile section (Student, Pro Plan)

known_limitations.issue: Roadmaps, Resources, and Study Logs pages are not implemented yet
known_limitations.impact: Clicking these links will show Next.js 404 page

known_limitations.issue: All data is hardcoded (streak count, roadmap steps, study log)
known_limitations.impact: No dynamic data from backend API

known_limitations.issue: Quick Notes textarea does not persist data
known_limitations.impact: Notes are lost on page refresh

known_limitations.issue: AI Assist button and Add Widget button have no functionality
known_limitations.impact: Buttons are UI-only with no action handlers
